Tenant.title: Tenant
Tenant.description: Represents an independent accounting entity or business dossier within the ComptaFisc-DZ application, often corresponding to a company or individual managed by the user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Tenant entity.

name.description: The official name of the tenant (e.g., company name, individual name).

nif.description: The National Tax Identification Number (NIF) of the tenant.

rc.description: The Commercial Register Number (RC) of the tenant, if applicable.

address.description: The physical address of the tenant.

email.description: The primary contact email address for the tenant.

phoneNumber.description: The primary contact phone number for the tenant.

creationDate.description: The date and time when this tenant profile was created.

currency.description: The primary operating currency for this tenant (e.g., DZD for Algerian Dinar).

fiscalHealthScore.description: A calculated score (0-100) indicating the fiscal health and compliance of the tenant.

lastFiscalHealthUpdate.description: The date and time when the fiscal health score was last calculated or updated.

userIds.description: An array of user IDs who have access to manage this tenant. (Relationship: Tenant N:N User)

TaxRegulation.title: TaxRegulation
TaxRegulation.description: Stores the latest Algerian tax, payroll, and stamp duty regulations and rates, used for dynamic client-side calculations.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TaxRegulation entity.

name.description: A descriptive name for the regulation (e.g., 'TVA Standard Rate', 'IRG Income Band 1').

type.description: The specific type of tax or contribution (e.g., 'TVA', 'TAP', 'IRG', 'IBS', 'IFU', 'CNAS', 'CASNOS', 'Stamp Duty').

category.description: The broader category of the regulation (e.g., 'Tax', 'Payroll', 'Other').

description.description: A detailed description of the regulation, including its scope and applicability.

effectiveDate.description: The date from which this regulation or rate becomes effective.

endDate.description: The date until which this regulation or rate is effective, if applicable. Null if indefinitely active.

value.description: The numeric value of the regulation (e.g., a percentage like 0.19, a fixed amount like 500 DZD, or a band limit).

conditions.description: A textual description or JSON string specifying any conditions for the regulation's application (e.g., income brackets for IRG, payment method for stamp duty).

referenceArticleIds.description: References to LegalArticle entities that provide the legal basis for this regulation. (Relationship: TaxRegulation N:N LegalArticle)

ChartOfAccount.title: ChartOfAccount
ChartOfAccount.description: Defines an individual account within the official Algerian Chart of Accounts (SCF) for a specific tenant, supporting hierarchical structures.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChartOfAccount entity.

tenantId.description: Reference to the Tenant this chart of account belongs to. (Relationship: Tenant 1:N ChartOfAccount)

accountNumber.description: The unique numerical identifier for the account (e.g., '600000').

accountName.description: The name of the account (e.g., 'Achats de marchandises').

accountCategory.description: The high-level category of the account (e.g., 'Assets', 'Liabilities', 'Equity', 'Revenue', 'Expense').

normalBalance.description: Indicates whether the account typically has a 'Debit' or 'Credit' balance.

isLeafAccount.description: True if this account can directly receive journal entries; false if it's a header account for grouping.

parentAccountId.description: Reference to the parent account in the hierarchy, if any. (Relationship: ChartOfAccount 1:N ChartOfAccount)

JournalEntry.title: JournalEntry
JournalEntry.description: Represents a single accounting transaction with one or more debit and credit line items.

id.description: Unique identifier for the JournalEntry entity.

tenantId.description: Reference to the Tenant this journal entry belongs to. (Relationship: Tenant 1:N JournalEntry)

entryDate.description: The date when the accounting transaction occurred.

description.description: A brief description or narrative of the journal entry.

documentReference.description: A textual reference to the source document (e.g., 'Invoice #123', 'Receipt R001').

status.description: The current status of the journal entry (e.g., 'Draft', 'Validated', 'Posted').

createdAt.description: The date and time when the journal entry was first created.

createdByUserId.description: The ID of the user who created this journal entry.

validatedAt.description: The date and time when the journal entry was validated, if applicable.

validatedByUserId.description: The ID of the user who validated this journal entry, if applicable.

JournalLineItem.title: JournalLineItem
JournalLineItem.description: Represents a single debit or credit line within a JournalEntry.

id.description: Unique identifier for the JournalLineItem entity.

journalEntryId.description: Reference to the JournalEntry this line item belongs to. (Relationship: JournalEntry 1:N JournalLineItem)

accountId.description: Reference to the ChartOfAccount affected by this line item. (Relationship: ChartOfAccount 1:N JournalLineItem)

amount.description: The monetary amount of the debit or credit.

type.description: Indicates whether the line item is a 'Debit' or 'Credit'.

description.description: An optional description specific to this line item.

Client.title: Client
Client.description: Represents a client or customer of a tenant, to whom invoices are issued.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Client entity.

tenantId.description: Reference to the Tenant that manages this client. (Relationship: Tenant 1:N Client)

name.description: The name of the client (company name or individual's full name).

nif.description: The National Tax Identification Number (NIF) of the client, if available.

rc.description: The Commercial Register Number (RC) of the client, if available.

address.description: The billing or primary address of the client.

email.description: The primary contact email address for the client.

phoneNumber.description: The primary contact phone number for the client.

contactPerson.description: The name of a specific contact person at the client organization.

Invoice.title: Invoice
Invoice.description: Represents an invoice generated by a tenant for a client, conforming to Algerian fiscal regulations.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Invoice entity.

tenantId.description: Reference to the Tenant that issued this invoice. (Relationship: Tenant 1:N Invoice)

clientId.description: Reference to the Client to whom this invoice was issued. (Relationship: Client 1:N Invoice)

invoiceDate.description: The date when the invoice was issued.

dueDate.description: The date by which the invoice payment is due.

totalAmountExcludingTax.description: The total amount of the invoice before any taxes.

totalTaxAmount.description: The total amount of all taxes applied to the invoice.

totalStampDutyAmount.description: The total amount of stamp duty applied to the invoice.

totalAmountIncludingTax.description: The grand total amount of the invoice, including taxes and stamp duty.

paymentMethod.description: The expected or recorded payment method for the invoice (e.g., 'Cash', 'Bank Transfer', 'Check').

status.description: The current status of the invoice (e.g., 'Draft', 'Issued', 'Paid', 'Overdue', 'Cancelled').

generatedPdfUrl.description: A URL linking to the generated PDF document of the invoice, archived in Cloud Storage.

sha256Hash.description: The SHA-256 hash of the generated PDF for integrity validation.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the invoice record was first created.

createdByUserId.description: The ID of the user who created this invoice.

InvoiceItem.title: InvoiceItem
InvoiceItem.description: Represents a single line item within an invoice.

id.description: Unique identifier for the InvoiceItem entity.

invoiceId.description: Reference to the Invoice this item belongs to. (Relationship: Invoice 1:N InvoiceItem)

description.description: A description of the product or service on this line item.

unitPrice.description: The price per unit of the item.

taxRateAppliedPercentage.description: The percentage tax rate applied to this specific line item (e.g., 0.19 for 19%).

taxAmount.description: The calculated tax amount for this line item.

lineTotalExcludingTax.description: The total amount for this line item, excluding tax.

lineTotalIncludingTax.description: The total amount for this line item, including tax.

TaxDeclaration.title: TaxDeclaration
TaxDeclaration.description: Represents a prepared Algerian tax or social declaration form for a specific period.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TaxDeclaration entity.

tenantId.description: Reference to the Tenant for whom this declaration was prepared. (Relationship: Tenant 1:N TaxDeclaration)

fiscalYear.description: The fiscal year to which this declaration pertains.

periodicity.description: The frequency of the declaration period (e.g., 'Monthly', 'Quarterly', 'Annually').

periodStart.description: The start date of the reporting period for this declaration.

periodEnd.description: The end date of the reporting period for this declaration.

submissionDeadline.description: The official deadline for submitting this declaration.

submissionDate.description: The actual date and time when the declaration was submitted.

status.description: The current status of the declaration (e.g., 'Draft', 'Generated', 'Submitted', 'Archived').

generatedPdfUrl.description: A URL linking to the generated PDF document of the declaration, archived in Cloud Storage.

sha256Hash.description: The SHA-256 hash of the generated PDF for integrity validation.

createdAt.description: The date and time when this declaration record was first created.

createdByUserId.description: The ID of the user who prepared this declaration.

declarationData.description: A JSON string containing the aggregated data and values required for the specific declaration form.

LegalArticle.title: LegalArticle
LegalArticle.description: Stores articles from the Algerian legal corpus (CIDTA/CTCA) to be used by the AI Fiscal Assistant.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LegalArticle entity.

corpusName.description: The name of the legal corpus or document (e.g., 'CIDTA', 'CTCA', 'LF 2026').

articleNumber.description: The specific article number or section identifier.

title.description: The title or subject of the article.

content.description: The full text content of the legal article.

sourceUrl.description: An optional URL to the official online source of the article.

keywords.description: A list of keywords associated with the article for search and retrieval.

UploadedDocument.title: UploadedDocument
UploadedDocument.description: Stores metadata and processing status for documents uploaded by users, especially for OCR ingestion.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UploadedDocument entity.

tenantId.description: Reference to the Tenant who uploaded this document. (Relationship: Tenant 1:N UploadedDocument)

fileName.description: The original file name of the uploaded document.

fileUrl.description: A URL linking to the uploaded document in Cloud Storage.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the uploaded file (e.g., 'application/pdf', 'image/jpeg').

uploadDate.description: The date and time when the document was uploaded.

uploadedByUserId.description: The ID of the user who uploaded the document.

documentType.description: The categorized type of the document (e.g., 'Invoice', 'Receipt', 'Bank Statement', 'Other').

ocrStatus.description: The processing status of the OCR operation (e.g., 'Pending', 'Processed', 'Failed', 'Review Needed').

extractedDataRaw.description: A JSON string containing the raw data extracted by the OCR engine.

associatedInvoiceId.description: Reference to the Invoice entity created or updated as a result of processing this document, if applicable. (Relationship: Invoice 1:N UploadedDocument)

associatedJournalEntryIds.description: References to JournalEntry entities created or updated as a result of processing this document, if applicable. (Relationship: UploadedDocument N:N JournalEntry)

definition.description: Represents an independent accounting entity. Includes a denormalized 'members' map for explicit multi-role access control (e.g., {userId: 'role'}) for all tenant-specific operations. This replaces the 'userIds' array for granular permissions.

params.name: tenantId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific Tenant.

definition.description: Defines an individual account within the official Algerian Chart of Accounts for a specific tenant. Includes denormalized 'tenantMembers' map for authorization independence, copied from the parent Tenant document.

params.name: tenantId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Tenant.

params.name: chartOfAccountId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific ChartOfAccount entry.

definition.description: Represents a single accounting transaction for a tenant. Includes denormalized 'tenantMembers' map for authorization independence, copied from the parent Tenant document.

params.name: tenantId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Tenant.

params.name: journalEntryId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific JournalEntry.

definition.description: Represents a single debit or credit line within a JournalEntry. Includes denormalized 'tenantMembers' map for authorization independence, copied from the grandparent Tenant document.

params.name: tenantId
params.description: The unique identifier of the grandparent Tenant.

params.name: journalEntryId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent JournalEntry.

params.name: journalLineItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific JournalLineItem.

definition.description: Represents a client or customer of a tenant. Includes denormalized 'tenantMembers' map for authorization independence, copied from the parent Tenant document.

params.name: tenantId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Tenant.

params.name: clientId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific Client.

definition.description: Represents an invoice generated by a tenant for a client. Includes denormalized 'tenantMembers' map for authorization independence, copied from the parent Tenant document.

params.name: tenantId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Tenant.

params.name: invoiceId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific Invoice.

definition.description: Represents a single line item within an invoice. Includes denormalized 'tenantMembers' map for authorization independence, copied from the grandparent Tenant document.

params.name: tenantId
params.description: The unique identifier of the grandparent Tenant.

params.name: invoiceId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Invoice.

params.name: invoiceItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific InvoiceItem.

definition.description: Represents a prepared Algerian tax or social declaration form for a specific period for a tenant. Includes denormalized 'tenantMembers' map for authorization independence, copied from the parent Tenant document.

params.name: tenantId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Tenant.

params.name: taxDeclarationId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific TaxDeclaration.

definition.description: Stores metadata and processing status for documents uploaded by a tenant. Includes denormalized 'tenantMembers' map for authorization independence, copied from the parent Tenant document.

params.name: tenantId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Tenant.

params.name: uploadedDocumentId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific UploadedDocument.

definition.description: Stores global tax, payroll, and stamp duty regulations and rates, accessible to all authenticated users for client-side calculations.

params.name: taxRegulationId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific TaxRegulation entry.

definition.description: Stores articles from the Algerian legal corpus, accessible to all authenticated users for the AI Fiscal Assistant (RAG Tool).

params.name: legalArticleId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific LegalArticle entry.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure for ComptaFisc-DZ is designed around a multi-tenant architecture with a strong emphasis on Authorization Independence, enabling robust security rules and efficient data access. **1. Multi-Tenant Hierarchy & Structural Segregation:**All tenant-specific data is organized under a top-level /tenants/{tenantId} collection. This creates clear logical boundaries, where {tenantId} acts as the primary access control point for all nested data. Entities like ChartOfAccount, JournalEntry, Client, Invoice, TaxDeclaration, and UploadedDocument are subcollections of /tenants/{tenantId}. Further nested data, such as JournalLineItem and InvoiceItem, continue this hierarchy under their respective parent documents.Global, read-only data, such as TaxRegulation and LegalArticle, are housed in dedicated top-level collections (/tax_regulations and /legal_articles). This segregation ensures a homogeneous security posture within each collection: global data is public/authenticated-read, while tenant data is strictly access-controlled, simplifying security rules significantly. **2. Authorization Independence via Denormalized Membership (CRITICAL):**To achieve Authorization Independence and eliminate get() calls in security rules, a crucial denormalization strategy is applied: The Tenant entity (at /tenants/{tenantId}) will contain a members map (e.g., {"userId1": "owner", "userId2": "comptable"}), defining the roles of all users who have access to that specific tenant. This "members" map is denormalized and copied into *every single document* within *all subcollections* of that tenant. For example, a JournalEntry document at /tenants/{tenantId}/journal_entries/{journalEntryId} will include a tenantMembers field, which is a direct copy of the members map from its parent Tenant document. The same applies to ChartOfAccount, Client, Invoice, TaxDeclaration, UploadedDocument, and their sub-subcollection documents like JournalLineItem and InvoiceItem.This denormalization is paramount because it allows security rules to evaluate access permissions *directly on the resource.data of the document being accessed*, without needing to fetch (via get()) any parent or related documents. This ensures atomic operations, simplifies rule logic, enhances performance, and is highly debuggable. **3. Queryable Authorization Patterns (QAPs):**The denormalization strategy directly supports secure list operations (QAPs): For any tenant-specific collection (e.g., /tenants/{tenantId}/journal_entries), a security rule can simply check request.auth.uid in resource.data.tenantMembers. When a user performs a list query, Firestore's security rules will implicitly filter the results to only include documents where request.auth.uid is present in the tenantMembers map. This eliminates the need for complex client-side filtering and ensures that users only retrieve data they are authorized to see, even when querying a collection.Similarly, for the top-level /tenants collection, list operations can check request.auth.uid in resource.data.members, allowing users to discover only the tenants they are part of. **4. DBAC (Database-Based Access Control):**User roles (owner, comptable, etc.) are stored directly in the members map within Tenant documents (and denormalized into subdocuments). Authorization relies solely on request.auth.uid and these database-stored roles, avoiding the use of custom claims which would introduce complexity and potential synchronization issues. **5. Data Clarity & Consistency:**Explicit status fields are used for state modeling (e.g., Draft, Validated), providing clear lifecycle stages.Consistent and semantic naming conventions are used for collections (_ for global, s for plural) and document wildcards ({tenantId}, {journalEntryId}), enhancing readability and predictability for development and debugging.
